name: LinkedIn Corporation
description: LinkedIn is the world's largest professional networking platform, connecting professionals to make them more productive and successful. Founded in 2003 and acquired by Microsoft in 2016, the company provides a comprehensive suite of services, including talent solutions, marketing solutions, and premium subscriptions. It serves as a vital hub for job seekers, recruiters, and businesses, enabling them to share professional experiences, post job listings, and engage in industry-related discussions. With over a billion members globally, LinkedIn continues to transform how companies hire, market, sell, and learn in the digital age.
